name: Zani - A Late Night Meal
description:
“Pizza time.”

Basically: It’s super late, Zani needed to work overtime as per usual. She notices that you haven’t left yet, and on a whim, she decides to invite you out to eat at Trattoria Margherita with her.

Author’s note:
